## Problem

What is missing, painful, or unclear today?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior or capability you want.

## Why It Matters

Explain the user or system impact.

## Scope

Note whether this affects control-plane behavior, contracts, UI, docs, or tests.

## Additional Context

Links, examples, or related prior art.
